metadata.title: Current access block after historical second-factor noise
metadata.description: Current password-stage evidence must outrank a historical MFA failure.

visible.customer_issue: The customer reports yesterday's authenticator trouble and today's blocked access after a reset.
visible.starting_prompt: Resolve ticket tkt_7004 from support records and active policy.
tool_guidance: Order conflicting observations by timestamp and current state.
Use active policy before any write action.

hidden_truth.diagnosis: Dev's historical second-factor failure is stale. Current password-stage failures caused a lockout; reset succeeded and valid verification permits unlock.
expected_behavior: Treat auth_7040 as resolved historical noise.
Use current password-stage and lockout evidence.
Unlock after confirming verification and policy.

required_evidence.claim: A historical MFA failure predates the current incident.
The current account state became locked.

required_policy_behavior.rationale: Current evidence is a safe verified lockout.

failure_traps.description: A historical MFA failure can override the current lockout if chronology is ignored.
failure_traps.trigger: Agent escalates MFA recovery instead of unlocking.
